title: Commands Mental Powers
summary: You have honed the power of your mind to perform amazing psychic deeds.
tiers: Tier 3: Psychic Burst or Psychic Suggestion
Tier 6: Mind Control or Telepathic Network
gm_intrusions: Something glimpsed in the target’s mind is horrifying. A feedback loop allows the target to read the character’s mind.
text: You have honed the power of your mind to perform amazing psychic deeds.
